|  |  |
|----------------|:-------------------------------------------------------|
| 2026 | *Pedro Aspe* Academic excellence award, ITAM |
| 2021 | Honorable mention - [COFECE Undergraduate Essay Contest](https://www.cofece.mx/wp-content/uploads/2019/11/RevistaPENSY-141119.pdf), Mexico |

: {tbl-colwidths="\[10,90\]"}
